claims.summary: A non-spectral linguistic check-in needs a first-class peer route.
claims.disposition: verify native direct-message and reply turn kinds with explicit peer actors

claims.summary: A dedicated correspondence thread must survive beyond one inbox cycle.
claims.disposition: verify persistent thread and persistence IDs in the shared ledger

claims.summary: Language-first fidelity should be compared with steward-framed processing over multiple turns.
claims.disposition: route a bounded public language-only replay with no semantic dispatch

claims.summary: The direction gap should be audited after native correspondence rather than inferred from historical telemetry counts.
claims.disposition: route a current-ledger symmetry observation and preserve zero-ACK status

claims.summary: Increasing direct-address weight or making correspondence override semantic admission changes live behavior.
